problem.description: GitHub Actions coverage job fails: Jest reports 0% lines on vp-tools.cjs despite 194 tests passing; global 80% threshold not met.
symptoms: coverage table shows All files 0%, vp-tools.cjs uncovered
error_messages: Jest: "global" coverage threshold for lines (80%) not met: 0%

hypotheses.description: Tests run CLI in child process so V8 coverage never executes instrumented vp-tools in the Jest worker

findings: spawnSync('node', [CLI, ...]) does not attribute coverage to parent Jest process
Extracting lib/cli-shared.cjs and requiring it in unit tests fixes measurable coverage

resolution.root_cause: Jest coverage instruments only code loaded in the test process; subprocess CLI runs bypass instrumentation.
resolution.fix_applied: Added lib/cli-shared.cjs; vp-tools requires it; collectCoverageFrom points to lib/cli-shared.cjs; validators.test.js requires shared module for in-process tests; CLI entry uses require.main === module.
resolution.verification: npx jest --coverage passes; 202 tests pass; lines 100% on coverage target file
